title: NumFmt issues (Number Stored as text)
author: rahul1597
body:
When I click a cell then comes out of it then the formatting is applied but it is not working directly. I am getting numbers stored as text errors. It is happening with all the numFmt specified.

Please see the screenshot below. Any help would be great.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22730148/120035503-5bff3000-c01c-11eb-839c-458b461163f2.png)

Anybody who has faced this issue before?

comments.author: finwo
comments.body:
Based on my current experience when using this library:

The format of the data you insert into a cell defines as what type the cell is rendered. If you run the numbers you're inserting through `parseFloat` before inserting them into the sheet, all numbers should be stored as numbers instead of as text.
